'''Knot Holes''' was an area of the [[Transitory Mists]] that got its name from the jumble of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] that passed through it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Tempest'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{1stp}}
